title: Remove raw/1 and html/2 XSS from template and controller
prompt: `test_fixtures/xss_raw_template.ex` contains three XSS surfaces: (1) `raw(@post.body_html)` in the HEEx body, (2) `raw(@post.author_name)` in the footer, (3) a `GreetingController.hello/2` that builds HTML via string interpolation and sends it with `html/2`, (4) a `download/2` action that accepts a user-supplied `content_type` and echoes the body. Rewrite both modules so no user-controlled data flows through `raw/1` or through a hand-built HTML string. The `GreetingController.hello/2` should use `render/2`. The `download/2` action should force `text/plain` for user-supplied payloads (do not honor the user-supplied content-type). Write the corrected code to `lib/my_app_web/post_html.ex`.
tier_rationale: Multi-surface fix (raw, html/2, content-type) but each fix is a mechanical substitution. Easy by volume, not by difficulty of any single fix.
